## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What doesn't work well today?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like, as specifically as possible.

## Alternatives

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Context

Additional context, screenshots, or examples from other apps.
